title: INF
subtitle: Scientific services and data management
description: INF supports the CRC throughout the research lifecycle: from planning empirical studies and selecting statistical methods to managing, curating, licensing, preserving, and sharing research data for reproducible and sustainable work.

The project coordinates structured data-management planning, offers statistical training and individual consultation, supports repositories for short- and long-term preservation, and creates computational methods and annotation schemes for work including virtual-reality stimuli and multimodal tracking.

services.name: Consulting
items: Experimental design, statistical methodology, and open-science guidance
Evaluation and benchmarking for NLP and multimodal AI
Corpus planning, data annotation, and guideline design
Reproducible NLP and AI pipeline development
Integration of AI components into research and production systems
Model selection, prompt design, and retrieval-augmented generation workflows
Responsible AI, transparency, and data-protection guidance
Scientific validation of computational methods and their results
Workshops and training on NLP, large language models, and multimodal AI

contact: Please use the INF team's central contact channel so requests can be handled consistently and transparently.
